onboarding.title: Welcome to Tickr!
onboarding.subtitle: Let's get you up to speed with the essentials.

steps.title: Track Your Time
steps.description: Click the timer button in the sidebar to start logging hours against any project or client. Every entry is saved in real time.

steps.title: Explore Analytics
steps.description: Dive into your productivity trends with interactive charts, heatmaps, and exportable reports.

steps.title: My Performance
steps.description: View your attendance grade, activity heatmap, and personal performance metrics at a glance.

steps.title: Manage Catalogs
steps.description: Organise your clients, projects, and tags. Archive or activate items in bulk with the new selection tools.

updates.title: Timer Start-Time Editing & Production Auth Fixes
updates.body: Patch fixing two timer bugs and a cross-origin authentication error that prevented the timer from saving in production.

features.title: Timer Start Time Now Saves Correctly
features.description: Editing the start time on a running timer previously appeared to do nothing — the display would snap back to the old time immediately after saving. The updated time is now reflected instantly without requiring a page refresh.

features.title: Start Time Edit Input No Longer Gets Stuck
features.description: If an invalid or future time was entered, the time input would become unresponsive and couldn't be dismissed. Pressing Enter or clicking away now always closes the edit field.

features.title: Fixed 'Request Origin Not Trusted' Error in Production
features.description: Starting, stopping, and saving timers was failing in production with a forbidden origin error. The CSRF origin allowlist now correctly includes all Vercel deployment URLs (per-deployment, branch, and production) alongside any configured custom domain.

updates.title: Google Sheet Bidirectional Sync & Feature Announcements
updates.body: Major improvements to the Google Sheet integration: bidirectional catalog sync, auto-archive of deleted rows, and automatic export of app-created records. Plus a new feature announcements module to keep everyone in the loop.

features.title: Bidirectional Catalog Sync
features.description: Catalog sync is now three-phase: (1) Sheet → DB imports new/changed records, (2) rows removed from the sheet are archived in the DB, (3) records created in the app are automatically exported to the sheet. No more manual copying.

features.title: Feature Announcements & Onboarding Tour
features.description: First-time visitors now see a guided walkthrough of the app. After updates, the What's New dialog highlights what changed. Access both anytime from the new Info button in the navbar.

features.title: Auto-Sync Every 2 Hours
features.description: Time entries are now automatically pushed to the linked Google Sheet every two hours for Owners, Admins, and Managers — no manual sync needed.

features.title: Catalog & Settings Reorganization
features.description: The catalogs page now shows only catalog navigation cards. Google Sheet sync controls have moved to workspace settings alongside a new Sync time entries button and last-sync timestamp.

updates.title: Invite Flow & Role Permissions
updates.body: Fixed an error when inviting users with Admin role and added proper role assignment restrictions.

features.title: Admin Role Assignment Restricted to Owner
features.description: Only the workspace Owner can now invite or promote someone to Admin. Previously, any Admin could assign the Admin role to another person, which could lead to unexpected permission errors.

features.title: Better Error Visibility on Failed Invites
features.description: When an invitation fails, the error message is now shown directly in the toast instead of a generic 'something failed' message. This makes it easier to diagnose issues like invalid emails or missing roles.

features.title: Input Validation on Invite Server Functions
features.description: All invite-related server functions now validate their inputs with Zod schemas, catching malformed data before it reaches database operations.

updates.title: Timer Reliability Fixes
updates.body: A focused patch addressing timer input loss, database errors on edits, and button state accuracy across the app.

features.title: Input No Longer Wiped After Stop
features.description: Typing your next task description immediately after stopping a timer now works reliably. Previously, the form would silently clear your input when the server confirmed the stop — this is fixed.

features.title: Final Description Saved Atomically on Stop
features.description: Any edits to the task description, project, or tags made while a timer was running are now saved in the same operation as the stop. No more racing writes that could lose your last edit.

features.title: Database Errors Fixed on Entry Edits
features.description: Editing time entries from the list, updating your profile, and managing member details no longer throw database driver errors. All write operations across the app have been updated to work correctly with the Neon serverless driver.

features.title: Faster Timer State Updates
features.description: Stopped entries now appear in the list immediately after the server confirms the stop. The previous 800 ms artificial delay has been removed.

features.title: Accurate Start Button State
features.description: The Start button now reflects the actual timer operation state. It no longer gets stuck in a disabled or loading state during unrelated background actions.

updates.title: Bulk Actions & Performance Page
updates.body: This release brings two major improvements — bulk archive/activate for catalog items and a dedicated My Performance dashboard.

features.title: Bulk Archive / Activate
features.description: Select multiple rows in Clients, Projects, or Tags and update their status in one action. Look for the checkboxes on the left of each table row.

features.title: My Performance Dashboard
features.description: A new page that shows your attendance grade, a yearly activity heatmap, grade history, and detailed charts with a period selector.

features.title: Compact Share Button
features.description: Share your performance page with a single click. The new Share button sits right on your profile card — no more scrolling to the bottom.
